source_pr.title: store/tikv: remove files
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
Files inside `store/tikv` are not used any more.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- remove all

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
failure_signature: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
fix_pattern: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.

evidence: evidence: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
